src: [CVPR 2026] Offical implementation of the paper "HiFi-Inpaint: Towards High-Fidelity Reference-Based Inpainting for Generating Detail-Preserving Human-Product Images".
ja: 【CVPR 2026】論文「HiFi-Inpaint: Towards High-Fidelity Reference-Based Inpainting for Generating Detail-Preserving Human-Product Images」の公式実装
